'''Yeb Yeb Adem'thorn''' was a [[Swokes Swokes/Legends|Swokes Swokes]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Makem Te/Legends|Makem Te]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. He moved from his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to a luxurious residence on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], a decision that, to some, confirmed Adem'thorn was corrupt. The Swokes Swokes opposed the [[Senate Resolution BR-0371|taxation of trade routes]] proposed by the Senate, but the resolution passed regardless. Later, when [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] called for a [[Vote of No Confidence/Legends|Vote of No Confidence]] in [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]], Adem'thorn supported the motion, resulting in the end of Valorum's career.

==Biography==
Yeb Yeb Adem'thorn was a [[Swokes Swokes/Legends|Swokes Swokes]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], who represented the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Makem Te/Legends|Makem Te]].<ref name="cswe" /> He was able to move from his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where he resided in a lavish and luxurious home. Some cited the move as evidence of Adem'thorn's corruption.<ref name="ccg" /> He opposed [[Senate Resolution BR-0371]], which called for the taxation of [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]].<ref name="ccg" /><ref name="ec">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref> The resolution was later passed, and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] protested the move by [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockading]] the peaceful world of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="tpm" />

[[File:Brodo_Asogi_Delegation.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Yeb Yeb Adem'thorn and his companions]]
Adem'thorn was joined by two other Swokes Swokes when [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] called for a special session of the Senate, to discuss the blockade of Naboo. Naboo's representative senator, [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], introduced his planet's ruler, [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]], who went on to claim that Naboo had been invaded by the Trade Federation. The Federation's representative, [[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod]], took exception to the accusation, and recommended that a commission be dispatched to Naboo, in order to discover the truth of the situation. [[Aks Moe/Legends|Aks Moe]] of [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] concurred with Dod.<ref name="tpm" />

Valorum, after conferring with [[Vice Chair/Legends|Vice Chairman]] [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]], asked Amidala if she would be willing to allow a commission to be sent, but the queen was not satisfied or pleased in the slightest. She, in response, called for a [[Vote of No Confidence/Legends|Vote of No Confidence]] in Valorum. Soon, calls for an immediate vote rang around the [[Grand Convocation Chamber]], and Adem'thorn, in addition to his two companions, joined in.<ref name="tpm" /> Adem'thorn later supported the Vote of No Confidence,<ref name="cswe" /> which resulted in the end of Valorum's career, and Palpatine's succession as Supreme Chancellor.<ref name="tpm" />

==Personality and traits==
Considered corrupt in some quarters, Yeb Yeb Adem'thorn opposed such resolutions as the taxation of trade routes,<ref name="ccg" /> but would support motions such as the Queen of Naboo's Vote of No Confidence in Chancellor Valorum.<ref name="cswe" /> In expressing his desire that the vote to decide Valorum's fate be held immediately, Adem'thorn waved his arms around vigorously.<ref name="tpm" /> The senator also lived in an expensive residence, drawing ire from others.<ref name="ccg" /> Adem'thorn had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and pale green skin.<ref name="tpm" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yeb Yeb Adem'thorn first appeared, unnamed, in [[George Lucas]]'s [[1999]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. He was later provided a name and backstory in the ''[[Coruscant Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].
